title: Minimax Code + M3 : Crazy Alternative to Claude,Codex!
summary: MiniMax M3 is an open-weights AI model designed for coding agents, long-context workflows, and multimodality. It supports up to one-million-token context windows and is compatible with both Anthropic and OpenAI APIs, enabling integration with tools like Cursor, Cline, and MiniMax Code.
writeup: The video covers MiniMax M3, an open-weights model aimed at coding, agents, and long-context work, with context windows up to one million tokens. It matters because the model exposes both Anthropic-compatible and OpenAI-compatible API endpoints, letting it slot into existing tools such as Claude Code, Cursor, and Cline. The accompanying MiniMax Code adds Agent Team features for multi-agent task implementation and verification.
